seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy."
new_constraint: Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy." Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
response: I recently visited "The Daily Grind," a new coffee shop that has quickly become a buzzworthy spot in the neighborhood. The atmosphere inside is incredibly comfortable, with soft lighting and plush seating perfect for a long read or a catch-up with friends. Their espresso drinks are expertly crafted, boasting rich, complex flavors that showcase the quality of their beans. Beyond the superb coffee, they also offer a delightful selection of fresh pastries that pair perfectly with a warm latte. Overall, The Daily Grind is a fantastic addition to our local scene and I highly recommend stopping by!<turn|>
final_answer: I recently visited "The Daily Grind," a new coffee shop that has quickly become a buzzworthy spot in the neighborhood. The atmosphere inside is incredibly comfortable, with soft lighting and plush seating perfect for a long read or a catch-up with friends. Their espresso drinks are expertly crafted, boasting rich, complex flavors that showcase the quality of their beans. Beyond the superb coffee, they also offer a delightful selection of fresh pastries that pair perfectly with a warm latte. Overall, The Daily Grind is a fantastic addition to our local scene and I highly recommend stopping by!<turn|>
